task_name: Add Phase Scanner Fixture Review Suite
goal: Add deterministic Phase Scanner fixture tests and wire them into the shared review suite without changing scanner runtime behavior.
claims: BP-027 adds deterministic Phase Scanner fixture tests.
BP-027 covers allow_single_track, require_human_review, and reject outputs.
BP-027 wires Phase Scanner fixtures into the shared review suite.
BP-027 does not change scanner runtime behavior.
assumptions: The existing Phase Scanner runtime is sufficient for first fixture review.
BP-004 remains a valid human-review fixture.
Adding review tests is the safest next Phase Scanner step before runtime changes.
dod: The test covers BP-004, BP-027 allow, and BP-027 reject fixtures.
tools/test-builder-adapter-review-suite.cjs runs the Phase Scanner fixture test.
stop_conditions: Phase Scanner runtime changes become necessary
Live Builder, auth, secrets, DB, deploy, or external system behavior becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: The Phase Scanner runtime exists, but the shared review suite did not execute scanner fixtures.
